Interface IPathConnectivityItem

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of path connectivity item.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("AF1F8762-15C5-41B8-841F-6F9C00C3B47E")]
public interface IPathConnectivityItem

Properties

Returns the edge first unit.
